project.description: SchemaSync — generate and apply database schema diffs via Liquibase. Triggered by the Telegram bot (/pipelines → /diff → /approve) or manually from Jenkins UI.

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: APPLY_DIFF
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: false = generate diff only, true = apply approved diff to production

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: DIFF_ID
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Microservice diff ID (auto-set by diff stage, required for apply)

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: BOT_USER_ID
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Telegram chat ID of the requesting user

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: PIPELINE_NAME
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Pipeline name echoed back to Telegram bot

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: SCHEMA_NAME
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: PostgreSQL schema to compare (e.g. public, app_schema)

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: DB_USERNAME
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Database username (must have DDL access on both DBs)

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: DB_PASSWORD
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Database password (no longer sent to API — managed server-side)

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail
MICROSERVICE_URL="http://schema-sync:8080" API_KEY="${API_KEY:?Set API_KEY via Jenkins credentials binding or environment injection}"
echo "=========================================" echo " SchemaSync Pipeline" echo " Mode: $([ "$APPLY_DIFF" = "true" ] && echo "APPLY" || echo "DIFF")" echo " Schema: ${SCHEMA_NAME}" echo " Source: ${SOURCE_DB_URL}" echo " Target: ${TARGET_DB_URL}" echo " Bot User: ${BOT_USER_ID:-manual}" echo "========================================="
if [ "$APPLY_DIFF" = "true" ]; then # # ═══ APPLY MODE ═══════════════════════════════════════ # echo "" echo ">>> Step 1: Approve diff #${DIFF_ID}" APPROVE_HTTP=$(curl -sf -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' \ -X POST "${MICROSERVICE_URL}/api/diffs/${DIFF_ID}/approve" \ -H "X-API-KEY: ${API_KEY}" || true) echo " Approve response: HTTP ${APPROVE_HTTP}"
echo "" echo ">>> Step 2: Apply changesets to production" # NOTE: JDBC credentials are managed server-side in the microservice config. # The API no longer accepts credentials in the request body. APPLY_RESULT=$(curl -sf -X POST "${MICROSERVICE_URL}/api/diffs/${DIFF_ID}/apply-filtered" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "X-API-KEY: ${API_KEY}" \ -d '{ "selectedChangeSetIds": [], "dbType": "POSTGRESQL" }') echo " Apply result: ${APPLY_RESULT}" echo "" echo "✅ Schema changes applied successfully"
else # # ═══ DIFF MODE ════════════════════════════════════════ # echo "" echo ">>> Step 1: Create diff request" CREATE_RESP=$(curl -sf -X POST "${MICROSERVICE_URL}/api/diffs" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -H "X-API-KEY: ${API_KEY}" \ -d "{ \"author\": \"bot-user-${BOT_USER_ID:-manual}\", \"description\": \"Diff from Jenkins (pipeline: ${PIPELINE_NAME:-schema-apply})\", \"includeSchemas\": [\"${SCHEMA_NAME}\"] }") echo " Response: ${CREATE_RESP}"
# Extract diff ID using built-in tools (no jq required) DIFF_ID=$(echo "$CREATE_RESP" | sed 's/.*"id":\([0-9]*\).*/\1/') echo " Diff ID: ${DIFF_ID}"
echo "" echo ">>> Step 2: Poll for completion (max 5 minutes)" for i in $(seq 1 60); do sleep 5 STATUS_RESP=$(curl -sf "${MICROSERVICE_URL}/api/diffs/${DIFF_ID}" \ -H "X-API-KEY: ${API_KEY}") STATUS=$(echo "$STATUS_RESP" | sed 's/.*"status":"\([A-Z_]*\)".*/\1/') echo " Poll #${i}: status = ${STATUS}"
if [ "$STATUS" = "VALID" ] || [ "$STATUS" = "INVALID" ]; then break fi done
if [ "$STATUS" != "VALID" ]; then echo "❌ Diff generation failed. Final status: ${STATUS}" # Still try to get validation log for debugging curl -sf "${MICROSERVICE_URL}/api/diffs/${DIFF_ID}/validation-log" \ -H "X-API-KEY: ${API_KEY}" || true exit 1 fi
echo "" echo ">>> Step 3: Download diff XML artifact" curl -sf "${MICROSERVICE_URL}/api/diffs/${DIFF_ID}/content" \ -H "X-API-KEY: ${API_KEY}" \ -o "schema-diff-${DIFF_ID}.xml" echo " Downloaded: schema-diff-${DIFF_ID}.xml ($(wc -c < schema-diff-${DIFF_ID}.xml) bytes)"
echo "" echo ">>> Step 4: Validation log" curl -sf "${MICROSERVICE_URL}/api/diffs/${DIFF_ID}/validation-log" \ -H "X-API-KEY: ${API_KEY}" || echo " (no log available)"
echo "" echo "✅ Diff generated successfully (ID: ${DIFF_ID})" fi
